# GPA Calculator Pakistan
A high-performance web tool for calculating University GPA/CGPA based on HEC criteria.

## Key Features
- Supports 4.0 and 5.0 GPA scales.
- Real-time percentage conversion.
- Mobile-friendly and works offline via Cloudflare.
- Specific presets for UST Bannu and KPK colleges.

## Usage
Users can input their credit hours and obtained grades to get an instant, accurate CGPA report.
